button_listitem_checkbox_base.name: downtime_flask1
button_listitem_checkbox_base.script: function onValueChanged() if getValue() == 1 then window.selectDowntimeFlask(1); end end

button_listitem_checkbox_base.name: downtime_flask2
button_listitem_checkbox_base.script: function onValueChanged() if getValue() == 1 then window.selectDowntimeFlask(2); end end

button_listitem_checkbox_base.script: function onValueChanged() if getValue() == 1 then window.selectDowntimeFlask(3); end end

button_listitem_checkbox_base.name: downtime_flask4
button_listitem_checkbox_base.script: function onValueChanged() if getValue() == 1 then window.selectDowntimeFlask(4); end end

button_listitem_checkbox_base.name: downtime_flask5
button_listitem_checkbox_base.script: function onValueChanged() if getValue() == 1 then window.selectDowntimeFlask(5); end end

button_listitem_checkbox_base.name: downtime_flask6
button_listitem_checkbox_base.script: function onValueChanged() if getValue() == 1 then window.selectDowntimeFlask(6); end end

button_listitem_checkbox_base.script: function onValueChanged() if getValue() == 1 then window.selectFlask(1); end end
